aliases: EZVIZ BC1c 4K Standalone Smart Home Battery Camera

power.method: Rechargeable battery (10,400mAh), USB-C charging (DC 5V/2A); solar-compatible (Type-C versions only, EZVIZ solar panel sold separately)

features: standalone wire-free battery camera, no base station required, distinct from the 1080p BC1C eLife
10,400mAh battery, USB-C charging, solar-compatible (Type-C versions only)
hybrid night vision IR 15m + color 15m, dual spotlights
no officially confirmed RTSP/ONVIF -- official docs list only 'EZVIZ Cloud Proprietary Protocol'
